plugins.name: ironclad-branding
plugins.description: Ironclad brand guidelines skill for creating on-brand assets — HTML pages, presentations, one-pagers, social posts, landing pages, event banners, email templates, and any visual content for Ironclad.

plugins.name: pipeline-forecast
plugins.description: Pipeline intelligence plugin for Ironclad mid-market sales. Provides /bootstrap-pipeline (first-time Notion dossier build), /run-forecast (weekly incremental updates), and /analyze-deal (single-deal ad-hoc analysis). Dispatches sub-agents per deal to prevent context degradation.
